recommendations.title: Saint-Jacques… La Mecque
recommendations.overview: Three siblings who detest each other and hiking must complete together a pilgrimage to Santiago de Compostela in order to be eligible to inherit their mother's wealth.

recommendations.title: La Belle Verte
recommendations.overview: As part of an intergalactic coalition, a well-meaning space alien volunteers to bring a message of self-actualization and harmony with nature to the one planet rejected by all her peers as incorrigible: Earth.

recommendations.title: The Crisis

recommendations.title: Pickpocket

recommendations.title: The Big Blue
recommendations.overview: Childhood friends Jacques and Enzo share a passion for the danger of free diving. Jacques, following in the footsteps of his father, who died at sea when Jacques was a boy, harbors a remarkable ability to adjust his heart rate and breathing patterns

recommendations.title: The Party
recommendations.overview: A thirteen-year-old French girl deals with moving to a new city and school in Paris, while at the same time her parents are getting a divorce.

recommendations.title: Raining Cats and Frogs

recommendations.title: With a Friend Like Harry...
recommendations.overview: While fixing up their summer cottage, Michel and his family run into a man who claims to have gone to high school with Michel.

recommendations.title: Overnight Delivery
